Package com.rays.form

Class MarksheetForm

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseForm<MarksheetDTO>
      • com.rays.form.MarksheetForm
  • public class MarksheetForm
extends BaseForm<MarksheetDTO>
    Form for Marksheet entity. Handles validation and DTO conversion for student marks including Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics scores.
    Author:
    Aniket Rajput

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected @NotNull(message="Chemistry is required") @Max(99L) @Min(0L) java.lang.Integer chemistry

      protected java.lang.String name  
      protected @NotNull(message="Physics is required") @Max(99L) @Min(0L) java.lang.Integer physics  
      protected @NotEmpty(message="Roll No is required") java.lang.String rollNo
